purpose: proves the live remote hash listing is planning-only, cursorable for larger scopes, and never becomes write authority

pull_pipeline.exporter: scans the merge base and coverage evidence
pull_pipeline.importer: persists the base package as immutable provenance

snapshot_listing.scope_source: the importer-owned base package plus the live remote identity
evidence: returns live remote comparison evidence for planning only
dry-run receipts must not promote a snapshot cursor into a lock
apply must revalidate fresh live evidence before every batch and at the storage boundary

auth_floor.required: at least as strict as current Reprint HMAC usage

required_invariants: remote snapshot hash listing is planning evidence, not write authority
snapshot hash listing is cursorable for large sites
dry-run is a receipt, not a lock
apply must revalidate the live remote before every batch and at the storage boundary
authentication must be at least as strict as current Reprint HMAC usage
